arguments.argument:
/* Projectile Spawner objectUseN - Object to use spriteUseN - Sprite to use shootDelayN - Shoot delay atkPowerN - Attack power dirN - Attack direction bulletSpeedN - Bullet speed */
objectUse=oTrapProjectile shootTime=1000 shootDelay=90 atkPower=4 spriteUse=0 dir=0 bulletSpeed=0 linkFrm=0 alarm[0]=1
